script: echo '=== Manual verification of afrah bot health (per-user pattern) ==='; echo; echo '--- Service status ---'; systemctl is-active afrah-bot.service afrah-responder.service; echo; echo '--- /home/afrah ownership + contents ---'; sudo ls -la /home/afrah/ 2>&1 | head -15; echo; echo '--- .afrah-bot dir + creds.json (should be afrah:afrah, creds 600) ---'; sudo ls -la /home/afrah/.afrah-bot/ 2>&1 | head -10; echo; echo '--- creds.json readable as afrah? ---'; sudo -u afrah cat /home/afrah/.afrah-bot/creds.json | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print("  keys:", list(d.keys())); print("  app_id matches:", d.get("app_id") == "05d6eaea-373a-4f23-8ec5-eed37ac83f19")' 2>&1; echo; echo '--- BF token mint as afrah ---'; sudo -u afrah bash -c 'SEC=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open(\"/home/afrah/.afrah-bot/creds.json\"))[\"client_secret\"])") ; APP=05d6eaea-373a-4f23-8ec5-eed37ac83f19 ; TEN=50186224-2255-444a-b321-60a84114115c ; curl -s -X POST "https://login.microsoftonline.com/$TEN/oauth2/v2.0/token" --data-urlencode "client_id=$APP" --data-urlencode "client_secret=$SEC" --data-urlencode grant_type=client_credentials --data-urlencode "scope=https://api.botframework.com/.default" | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(\"  has_token:\", bool(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"access_token\")))"'; echo; echo '--- can afrah read shared Claude CLI? ---'; sudo -u afrah test -r /home/azureuser/.claude.json && echo '  .claude.json readable' || echo '  NOT readable'; sudo -u afrah test -x /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude && echo '  claude binary executable' || echo '  NOT executable'; echo; echo '--- systemd unit User= for both services ---'; systemctl show afrah-bot.service -p User --value; systemctl show afrah-responder.service -p User --value
